content: I've been haunted all my life as a form of PTSD I suppose by the brutal treatment I recieved physically and mentally from my parents during my wayward high school years. It was largely because of this that I chose to go as far away as I could and stay away as long as I did. There has always been a--to me-- superficial feeling of 'love' and respect in a filial sense between me and my parents, but never any meaningful level of communication. My father died a few years ago and my mother is still living.
